creator: tj+freebsd_ports@a13.fr
text:
I think it requires to update the `x11/rubygem-gnome2' meta port, and
most of its dependencies at the same time:

  accessibility/rubygem-atk
  devel/rubygem-cairo-gobject
  devel/rubygem-gio2
  devel/rubygem-glib2
  devel/rubygem-gobject-introspection
  graphics/rubygem-clutter
  graphics/rubygem-clutter-gtk
  graphics/rubygem-gdk_pixbuf2
  graphics/rubygem-rsvg2
  multimedia/rubygem-clutter-gstreamer
  multimedia/rubygem-gstreamer
  www/rubygem-webkit-gtk
  www/rubygem-webkit-gtk2
  x11-toolkits/rubygem-gdk3
  x11-toolkits/rubygem-gtk2
  x11-toolkits/rubygem-gtk3
  x11-toolkits/rubygem-gtksourceview2
  x11-toolkits/rubygem-gtksourceview3
  x11-toolkits/rubygem-pango
  x11-toolkits/rubygem-poppler
  x11-toolkits/rubygem-vte
  x11-toolkits/rubygem-vte3

Is a script usually used to facilitate changes review and applying
updates to all ports? Or is it done by hand for each?
